arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Getafe: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: La Liga leaders Barcelona are in midweek action as they take on a struggling Getafe side in Catalonia on Wednesday night. The German has been forced to deal with an ever-growing injury list, but he's nonetheless overseen six victories from six to start the new La Liga season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'make contact' with retired goalkeeper after Marc-Andre ter Stegen injury
arts.sum: Barcelona are reported to be in talks with former Juventus goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny as they consider options to replace Marc-Andre ter Stegen. Claudio Bravo, who shared duties with Ter Stegen for two years and only recently retired after leaving Real Betis, has offered his services to his former club .

arts.ttl: Barca should have signed a goalkeeper in the summer, but better late than never
arts.sum: However, I wrote a few months back that Barcelona should sign a new goalkeeper in the summer transfer window because the situation was not looking good. But Ter Stegen’s injury is quite serious, so much so that Barcelona don’t just need a keeper who will bridge the gap until the next transfer window, they need someone who can be a starter for a long time, maybe indefinitely.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen speaks out after horror injury in Barca’s win
arts.sum: The goalkeeper is now expected to miss the majority of the 2024-25 season but is in positive mood and has thanked his many well-wishers for their support. I want to thank the Villarreal supporters for their respect displayed in the stadium, it means a lot to me.

arts.ttl: Villarreal star admits ‘I cried for five minutes’ after Barcelona star Ter Stegen’s injury
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga outfit Villarreal has opened up on the mental and emotional impact which the serious injury suffered by Barcelona’s Marc-André ter Stegen…

arts.ttl: “I feel positive and strong” – Marc-Andre Ter Stegen issues statement following season-ending knee injury
arts.sum: Barcelona have been rocked by news that Marc-Andre Ter Stegen will almost certainly miss the remainder of the season, having suffered a serious knee injury during Sunday’s victory over Villarreal at La Ceramica. It means that the Catalans will be without their captain and first-choice goalkeeper until next season, which is a major blow. On […] The post “I feel positive and strong” – Marc-Andre Ter Stegen issues statement following season-ending knee injury appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick has chosen Barcelona’s leading goalkeeper target
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has informed those in a position of power at the club of his preferred target to reinforce his ranks between the posts. That’s according to…

GK: Inaki Pena - It's Pena time in Barcelona after Marc-Andre ter Stegen suffered a nasty knee injury in the rout of Villarreal at the weekend. The club's number two enjoyed a prolonged run in the team while the German nursed a back injury last season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona starlet’s new contract to feature massive release clause
arts.sum: The new contract set to be signed by Barcelona starlet Marc Bernal will feature a brand-new big-money release clause. That’s according to Jijantes, who have on Tuesday provided a fresh…

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Getafe injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's La Liga clash between Barcelona and Getafe.
